dominant_clusters: Privacy-preserving distributed model training (FedAvg, FedProx, SCAFFOLD)
Handling non-IID and heterogeneous medical data across clinical sites
Secure aggregation and differential privacy for patient-level protections
emerging_trends: Federated transfer learning for rare disease detection with limited labeled data
Personalized federated models adapting to site-specific patient demographics
Cross-silo federated learning integrating EHR, imaging, and genomic modalities
Asynchronous federated protocols for resource-constrained edge hospital devices
